vocab.meaning: có lợi/tạo điều kiện cho việc làm việc sâu
vocab.example: I find that a minimalist room is highly conducive to deep work as there are fewer visual triggers to distract me.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nghiêm túc trong học tập
vocab.example: Being surrounded by upperclassmen in the silent wing of the library encourages a sense of academic rigor.
I sometimes seek out a cloistered environment, like an old archive room, to escape the noise of the modern world.

vocab.meaning: sự mệt mỏi về trí não
vocab.example: When I start to feel the onset of mental fatigue, I switch my study location to a balcony to get some fresh air.

vocab.meaning: không gian làm việc được sắp xếp tỉ mỉ
vocab.example: I've spent years developing a curated workspace at home, complete with an adjustable desk and plants.

vocab.meaning: sự kích thích về mặt trí tuệ
vocab.example: I enjoy studying in university common rooms because the atmosphere of intellectual stimulation is quite palpable.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: The main reason I go to a study pod is to guarantee at least three hours of uninterrupted focus.

vocab.meaning: một sự thay đổi về khung cảnh/môi trường
vocab.example: Every few days I need a change of scenery, so I migrate from my bedroom to a quiet neighborhood bistro.
Identifying the time and place for optimal productivity has been crucial for my exam preparation.

vocab.meaning: một hoạt động mang tính đơn độc
vocab.example: For me, studying is a solitary pursuit, so I avoid group areas where social chatting is likely to occur.
